cluster.title: Docs Corpus & Prior Art
cluster.summary: 325 tracked files / ~89k lines of governance contracts, three generations of redesign/PRD corpora, a 30-PR hardening roadmap, security/CI/deployment runbooks, and prior dead-code + decomposition audits. Living contracts (CLAUDE.md, security, ci-cd, deployment) are strong and implementation-tied; planning strata (~70k LOC) carry stale statuses; the prior dead-code audit folder 'backend' actually re-audits ai-backend, leaving services/backend never audited.

nodes.summary: Root governance: CLAUDE.md agent contract, product README, SECURITY.md, LICENSE (MIT), CODEOWNERS, dev-testing.md
13 .mdc Cursor mirrors of the CLAUDE.md rule hierarchy; two (service-boundaries, workspace-architecture) drifted to the pre-desktop era
Topology, service boundaries, desktop-app spec (frozen adapter contracts), runtime stream handshake contract, multi-tenant trust chain
ADR-0001 monorepo; ADR-0002 yoyo-migrations with MANIFEST.lock CI gate
30-PR bank/gov hardening roadmap (A1-A10 identity, B1-B8 usage, C1-C12 DB/deploy) as self-contained PR briefs; no shipped-status tracking
Control mapping (SOC2/ISO/NIST/ASVS), trust matrix, IR + vuln mgmt, and C5/C6/C7/C9 runbooks (RLS, key rotation, field encryption, SIEM pump)
CI assurance spec (gating/evidence/known-gap), runner trust (SHA pinning, OIDC), tenants.yml deploy model, resilience/migration/restore runbooks
ENTERPRISE_DEPLOYMENT_PROFILE toggle matrix, DB tuning/replicas/observability env contracts, Google OAuth + SIWE setup, desktop release runbook
Desktop Postgres-to-file store offline migration runbook (AC2)
65 files / 31.7k LOC: Atlas web redesign PR specs (waves 0-9, W0 dev IdP, citations 01-04); largely shipped but statuses still read Draft
16 files / 13.1k LOC: Atlas Workspace destination PRDs + binding cross-audit + implementation plan (May 2026, orchestrator-binding)
Original custom-Electron plan: PRD, Phase-S spike + S2 decision, phases 0-7; superseded for the shell by desktop-redesign, still the substrate/tier reference
Current desktop shell PRD set: PLAN (locked decisions, chat-surface SSOT ADR), 60-PR DAG README with consistency report, DEV-GUIDE, DESIGN-SPEC, phases 0-6
AC1-AC10 desktop capability track (file store, broker, Monty, browser, connectors) + living TODO status board; current as of 2026-07-18
Account linking & merge PRD (approved 2026-07-19); full-merge D-01/D-02 decisions, org-consolidation scope
61-file 2026-05-06 dead-code audit: TWO parallel ai-backend passes (folder 'backend' mislabeled), facade pass, frontend knip pass (partially executed at a78bfc0); services/backend never audited
Per-file A-G structural inventory of ai-backend bespoke logic (22 of ~40 promised docs exist; refactor/replacement companions missing)
13 end-to-end flow traces (runs, SSE reconnect, approvals, subagents, skills); README index desynced from actual files (13/14 links broken)

edges.label: mirrors CLAUDE.md rule hierarchy (CLAUDE.md authoritative on conflict)
each flow step links into decomp sections
supersedes/evolves for product shell; substrate reference retained
stream-handshake stable event families + projection fields
sequence_no resume + event vocabulary contract
desktop-app.md architecture spec + frozen SaaSRendererAdapter/Transport contracts
CLI-first distribution channels A/B
CI assurance spec is declared source of truth for CI/CD controls
Actions workflows, GHCR, OIDC issuer, environments
ENTERPRISE_DEPLOYMENT_PROFILE toggle matrix + RUNTIME_DB_*/BACKEND_DB_* contracts
Google OAuth + SIWE setup; third copy of EIP-4361 template
Google Cloud OAuth client setup + pinned OIDC endpoints
EIP-4361/EIP-6963 wallet login + chain allowlist
RLS, field-encryption, retention/deletion, audit-durability runbooks over runtime tables
SIEM export pump, token-vault key rotation, service-auth trust matrix
runtime_adapters.migrate postgres-to-file migration runbook
ADR-0002 yoyo-migrations + MANIFEST.lock per service
Track A specs A1-A10 (schema, sessions, OIDC, SAML, SCIM, MFA, RBAC)
Track B/C specs (usage tables, RLS, encryption, retention, replicas)
dev-testing.md dev-IdP mint chain + service-token header contract
facade-only rule (:8200) for all app/API access
web redesign PR specs (waves 0-9, citations, settings, approvals)
11 destination PRDs + binding cross-audit ItemRef contract
SSOT ADR: hoist interaction layer into chat-surface behind ports
AC track: file store, checkpointers, Monty, browser worker, TODO status board
capability broker + desktop feature gates; no-web-impact invariant
account linking & merge PRD (D-01/D-02 full merge)
dead-code claims: schemas/inbox.py unused, inbox SSE duplicate wire shape
claims: get_tracer/get_meter dead, readiness_checkers unwired, _raise_for_upstream x3, spec drift
knip inventory; open export-hygiene + type-export sweeps (cleanup a78bfc0)
ToolBudgetMiddleware.check_admit unwired-from-production claim
handlers-run / stream-events / stream-tools A-G inventories
runtime_api_store megaclass (2,344 LOC) inventory + seams
SSE reconnect / cancel / subagent flow traces
chat-transport / chat-surface / surface-renderers boundary ownership
